title: AXDataSource
description: Generic data source class for managing data with filtering, sorting, and pagination capabilities.

sections.title: Class Definition
sections.description: Accurate API surface from the source (trimmed to signatures).

props.name: config
props.description: Configuration including key, pageSize and loader callbacks.

props.name: useCache
props.description: Whether to reuse previously fetched pages.

props.name: totalCount
props.description: Total item count from the last load.

props.name: totalPages
props.description: Total pages derived from totalCount and pageSize.

props.name: cachedItems
props.description: Backing store containing cached items by page.

methods.content:
/**
 * Navigate to a page and load its items.
 *
 * @param page - The page number to navigate to.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
setPage(page: number): void

/**
 * Change page size and reload.
 *
 * @param pageSize - The new page size.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
setPageSize(pageSize: number): void

/**
 * Set the filter condition applied on load.
 *
 * @param value - The filter option to apply.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
filter(value: AXDataSourceFilterOption): void

/**
 * Set sorting descriptors.
 *
 * @param value - The sort options to apply.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
sort(...value: AXDataSourceSortOption[]): void

/**
 * Clear the active filter.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
clearFilter(): void

/**
 * Reset query, cache and counters.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
reset(): void

/**
 * Reload with the current query (optionally reset first).
 *
 * @param options - Optional configuration object.
 * @param options.reset - Whether to reset before reloading. Defaults to true.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
refresh(options?: { reset?: boolean }): void

/**
 * Find an item by key from cache or via byKey callback.
 *
 * @param key - The key to search for.
 * @returns T | Promise<T> - The found item or a promise that resolves to the item.
 */
find(key: unknown): T | Promise<T>

/**
 * Load items by a one-off filter using the loader.
 *
 * @param filter - The filter option to apply.
 * @returns Promise<AXDataSourceCallbackResult<T>> - A promise that resolves to the filtered results.
 */
getItemsByFilter(filter: AXDataSourceFilterOption): Promise<AXDataSourceCallbackResult<T>>
